_: Source registry + metric dictionary (product plan P0). One canonical definition per metric; every page must cite from here.

bls_laus.name: BLS Local Area Unemployment Statistics
bls_laus.access: flat file (laucntycur14.zip), residential proxy required from datacenter IPs

unemployment_rate_laus.label: Unemployment rate
unemployment_rate_laus.notes: NSA — compare YoY. Latest 1-2 months preliminary.

median_household_income_acs.label: Median household income
median_household_income_acs.notes: 5-year pooled estimate; county MOEs modest, sub-county large.
